name: tremor-progress-circle
title: Progress Circle
author: Tremor
description: Shows a bounded scalar value as an accessible circular progress indicator with caller-provided center content.

changes: Added a prominent Apache-2.0 modification notice.
Normalized invalid maximum and value inputs before geometry, data attributes, and ARIA output.
Forwarded the caller's accessible name, description, and value text to the progressbar and hid its decorative SVG and center content from assistive technology.
Disabled the animated stroke transition when reduced motion is requested.
Removed the unreachable nonnegative-value conditional around the foreground circle.

modifications.change: Added the required modification marker and minimally corrected value normalization, accessible naming and description, decorative semantics, reduced-motion behavior, and an unreachable render branch.
modifications.reason: Keep Tremor's visual and prop API while making the draft safe for invalid progress inputs and baseline accessibility review.
